# Tarmin2 Repository Protocol

This project utilizes a Spec-Driven Development flow. 

When you are asked to generate code, refactor, or propose architecture designs, you must first read the following files located in the root of the repository:
1. `spec.md` - Read this to understand the core game loops, systems (like Maze Generation, Combat, Survival), and current feature roadmap.
2. `agent.md` - Read this to understand the non-negotiable coding conventions, LibGDX specific teardowns, logging policies, and standard mechanics lexicon (e.g., War Strength, Satiety).

Do not begin generating code without acknowledging the constraints defined in these two specification documents.
